acceptance_targets: [ch06-F001] Pass if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:221 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:247 shows (1) at least one Ina demand rejected, (2) at least one demand accepted with restrictive carve-outs, and (3) one explicit concession Ina gives before signing; fail if protections are granted without visible cost.

[ch06-F002] Pass if, after surveillance confirmation at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:382, no explicit place-name route instructions are spoken in the open-alley exchange and at least one concrete countersurveillance action is shown before operational talk resumes; fail otherwise.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:221 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:247 shows (1) at least one Ina demand rejected, (2) at least one demand accepted with restrictive carve-outs, and (3) one explicit concession Ina gives before signing; fail if protections are granted without visible cost.
findings.problem: The interrogation power balance collapses too quickly: Ina secures multiple procedural protections in one pass with minimal counter-cost, which weakens the coercive credibility of the scene and blunts the chapter's central double-bind.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the negotiation between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:221 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:247 so each protection request triggers explicit institutional pushback. Keep Ina's leverage move, but force a concrete trade (for example: one immediate deliverable, one denied demand, one accepted condition with narrow wording) before signature at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:303.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after surveillance confirmation at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:382, no explicit place-name route instructions are spoken in the open-alley exchange and at least one concrete countersurveillance action is shown before operational talk resumes; fail otherwise.
findings.problem: Operational logic breaks in the alley scene: after confirming active surveillance, Ina and Minjae still exchange actionable movement guidance and route specifics in an exposed location, undermining their competence and the surveillance threat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchange between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:382 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:429 so once the tail is confirmed, actionable details are moved off-site/off-channel. Keep the burner handoff, but replace spoken route specifics with coded placeholders or deferred secure contact steps.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
